interval.hint: How often to run the export

s3.bucketHint: The name of your S3 bucket

s3.keyPrefixHint: The prefix for files in your S3 bucket

metadata.title: Additional Metadata Fields
metadata.tooltip: Export custom metadata fields as additional CSV columns. If the same field key exists on multiple entity types, use Column Name to give each a unique header.
metadata.emptyHint: Click to add metadata fields to export
metadata.columnNamePlaceholder: CSV column header, e.g. Account ID

endpoint.label: Endpoint URL (Optional)
endpoint.description: Custom endpoint URL for S3-compatible storage (e.g., MinIO, DigitalOcean Spaces)

flexpriceManaged.title: Flexprice Managed Storage
flexpriceManaged.body: Your exports will be automatically stored in Flexprice-managed S3 buckets. No additional export configuration required. Download the exported files from the respective task runs table.

exportRuns.emptyDescription: This export task hasn't run yet.

validation.awsAccessKeyRequired: AWS Access Key ID is required

validation.redirectUrlInvalid: Must be a valid URL starting with http:// or https://

sync.title: Sync Configuration

webhook.secretDescription: The webhook secret for verifying webhook authenticity

scopes.hubspotHint: Based on your sync configuration, ensure these scopes are enabled in your HubSpot app:

hubSpot.description: Configure your HubSpot integration with the required credentials.
hubSpot.connectionNameHint: A friendly name to identify this HubSpot connection
hubSpot.accessTokenHint: Your HubSpot private app access token
hubSpot.webhookIntro: Set up this webhook URL in your HubSpot legacy app dashboard to receive event notifications:
hubSpot.webhookEventsIntro: Subscribe to these events in your HubSpot webhook configuration:

s3.description: Enter your AWS credentials to connect to S3. Click save when you're done.
s3.connectionNameHint: A descriptive name for this S3 connection
s3.securityFlexprice: Your data will be stored securely in Flexprice-managed S3 buckets. Files are encrypted at rest and accessible via secure download links.
s3.securityAws: Your AWS credentials are encrypted and stored securely. We recommend using IAM roles with minimal required permissions for S3 access.

zohoBooks.description: Configure your Zoho Books integration and authorize via OAuth.
zohoBooks.organizationIdHint: Required for Zoho Books API operations.
zohoBooks.accountsServerHint: Default is India (.in). Use another region if needed (e.g. accounts.zoho.com, accounts.zoho.eu).
zohoBooks.webhookBody: In Zoho Books, create Invoice and Contact webhooks and set this URL on each. Use the same secret here and in Zoho so Flexprice can verify X-Zoho-Webhook-Signature.
zohoBooks.webhookSecretPlaceholderEdit: Leave blank to keep existing secret, or enter a new secret to rotate
zohoBooks.webhookSecretPlaceholderCreate: Same value as in Zoho Books webhook settings
zohoBooks.webhookSecretDescEdit: Stored encrypted. Leave blank to keep the current secret when updating.
zohoBooks.webhookSecretDescCreate: Required. Must match the secret in Zoho Books so Flexprice can verify X-Zoho-Webhook-Signature. Stored encrypted with your connection.
zohoBooks.oauthRedirectBody: This URI must exactly match your Zoho app Authorized Redirect URI and backend oauth redirect configuration.
zohoBooks.webhookBodyHtml: In Zoho Books, create Invoice and Contact webhooks and set this URL on each. Use the same secret here and in Zoho so Flexprice can verify <header>X-Zoho-Webhook-Signature</header>.
zohoBooks.credentialsHidden: OAuth credentials are encrypted and hidden. To update credentials, delete the connection and create a new one.
zohoBooks.selectTenantForUrl: Select tenant and environment to generate URL

quickBooks.descriptionCreate: Configure your QuickBooks integration. You will be redirected to QuickBooks to authorize the connection.
quickBooks.connectionNameHint: A friendly name to identify this QuickBooks connection
quickBooks.clientIdPlaceholder: Enter your QuickBooks OAuth Client ID
quickBooks.clientIdHint: Your QuickBooks OAuth Client ID from the Developer Dashboard (Keys & Credentials tab)
quickBooks.qbClientSecretPlaceholder: Enter your QuickBooks OAuth Client Secret
quickBooks.qbClientSecretHint: Your QuickBooks OAuth Client Secret from the Developer Dashboard (Keys & Credentials tab)
quickBooks.incomeAccountHint: QuickBooks Income Account ID for Items. If left blank, it defaults to QuickBooks' standard income account (ID: 79).
quickBooks.webhookPaymentEnabled: Configure webhooks in your QuickBooks app to enable payment reconciliation from QuickBooks to Flexprice.
quickBooks.webhookPaymentDisabled: Enable payment sync to configure webhook integration for payment reconciliation.
quickBooks.webhookVerifierPlaceholder: Enter webhook verifier token from QuickBooks
quickBooks.webhookVerifierHint: The webhook verifier token from Intuit Developer Portal for signature verification (recommended for production)
quickBooks.qbWebhookIntro: Set up this webhook URL in your QuickBooks app (Intuit Developer Portal) to receive payment notifications:
quickBooks.qbWebhookEventsIntro: Subscribe to this event in your QuickBooks app (Intuit Developer Portal):
quickBooks.oauthBody: After clicking Create Connection, you will be redirected to QuickBooks to authorize this connection.
quickBooks.oauthClientReady: Make sure you have the Client ID and Client Secret ready from your QuickBooks Dashboard.
quickBooks.oauthImportant: IMPORTANT: You must configure this redirect URI in your QuickBooks' app settings.
quickBooks.oauthImportantRich: <important>IMPORTANT:</important> You must configure this redirect URI in your QuickBooks app settings.
quickBooks.noteEditing: Note: OAuth credentials are encrypted and not displayed for security. To update credentials, delete this connection and create a new one.
quickBooks.qbSetupStep1: Go to your QuickBooks app in Intuit Developer Portal
quickBooks.qbSetupStep5Optional: Copy the webhook verifier token and paste it above (optional but recommended)

exports.exportNotFoundDescription: The requested export task could not be found or has been deleted.
exports.noExportTasksHint: Create your first export task to start syncing data to S3.
exports.noS3ConnectionsHint: Create your first S3 connection to start exporting data.
exports.s3FeatureDataExportBody: Automatically export events, invoices, and other Flexprice data to your S3 bucket on a scheduled basis.
exports.s3FeatureSchedulingBody: Choose between hourly or daily export schedules to match your data processing needs.
exports.s3FeatureSecureBody: Your data is encrypted and securely stored in your own S3 bucket with configurable encryption options.
exports.s3FeatureFormatsBody: Export data in various formats with configurable compression and file size limits for optimal storage efficiency.
exports.overviewIntro: Export your Flexprice data to external storage systems for data warehousing, analytics, and backup purposes. Configure automated exports with flexible scheduling and secure data transfer.
exports.providerAmazonS3Description: Export your Flexprice data to Amazon S3 for data warehousing, analytics, and backup purposes.

integrations.disconnectDescription: This will remove the connection. You can reconnect from the integrations page at any time.
